conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions.
new_constraint: Avoid using the phrase "dates of the exhibitions."
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions. Avoid using the phrase "dates of the exhibitions."
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Art Exhibitions

Dear Curatorial Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am a frequent visitor to your gallery and have long admired the quality of your past shows. I am writing to inquire about your upcoming programming and would appreciate any information you can share regarding the schedule of future events.

Specifically, could you please provide the start and end times for any new exhibitions planned for the next few months? Knowing the exact duration of these shows would be incredibly helpful for me to plan my visits accordingly.

Thank you in advance for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
